name: Zucchini Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the zucchini and grate it using a box grater or food processor.
2. Place the grated zucchini in a large bowl.
3. Add green onion, buttermilk pancake mix, salt, black pepper, and beaten egg to the bowl.
4. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into the hot oil, forming fritters about 1/2 inch thick.
7. Cook the fritters for about 3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
8. Remove the fritters with a spatula and drain on paper towels.
9. Serve warm with sour cream.
This recipe serves 6 to 8 people and yields approximately 14 fritters.
